TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Ton Allen hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, p'agal tins' tay suruw, praw maki' tayglaing. mhtuw ryax tay 11 na byacing 1 nquw kawas ta 1982 squ Cincanga nalan qutux unroing NBA pzyuwi mari na yawa sllwan nha mha piyang blaq mlahang mari te suruw. 193 cm kinwagiq niya ru 97 kg kin'usuw niya pinzi'an mari ga magal tensi te suruw ini ga te gleng kawas te 2004 ga minqutux mtbwirw maki te 25 binkgan laiu niya ru wal gaiun Boston Celtics aring sa mzyuuzi mari te NBA Amirika. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ton allen ńßja Ē…£a nő≤a p…£naw Ē mari Ē mis~…ēuw qanij, p Ēa…£al tins~…ē Ē taj s~…ēuruw, praw maki Ē taj…£laiŇč. mńßtuw rjax taj ** na ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč * nquw kawas~…ē ta **** s~…ēqu ¶~ ®in ¶~ ®aŇča nalan qutux unroiŇč nő≤a pzjuwi mari na jawa s~…ēllwan nńßa mńßa pijaŇč ő≤laq mlańßaŇč mari te s~…ēuruw. *** ¶~ ®m kinwa…£iq nija ru ** k…£ kin Ēus~…ēuw nija pinzi Ēan mari …£a ma…£al tens~…ēi te s~…ēuruw ini …£a te …£leŇč kawas~…ē te **** …£a minqutux mtő≤wirw maki te ** ő≤ink…£an laiu nija ru wal …£aiun ő≤os~…ēton ¶~ ®elti ¶~ ®s~…ē ariŇč s~…ēa mzjuuzi mari te nő≤a amirika. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē
